name: PUBLIC SERVICE CO OF NEW MEXICO
summary: PNM Energy Transition Bond Company I, LLC is a special purpose entity and wholly-owned subsidiary of Public Service Company of New Mexico (PNM), which is itself a subsidiary of TXNM Energy, Inc. The company was formed to issue energy transition bonds (asset-backed securities) secured by energy transition property purchased from PNM. U.S. Bank Trust Company, National Association serves as Indenture Trustee, and PNM acts as servicer and administrator.

products.name: Energy Transition Bonds
products.description: Asset-backed securities issued November 15, 2023, secured by energy transition property purchased from Public Service Company of New Mexico.

partnerships.partner_name: Public Service Company of New Mexico
partnerships.description: PNM acts as depositor, sponsor, servicer, and administrator for the Issuing Entity under multiple agreements.

partnerships.partner_name: U.S. Bank Trust Company, National Association
partnerships.description: Serves as Indenture Trustee under the Indenture dated November 15, 2023.
Serves as Securities Intermediary under the Indenture dated November 15, 2023.
Provides independent manager services to the Issuing Entity for an annual fee of $3,500.
